description: Don't allow the monsoon to dictate your fashion sense! Wear these stylish sandals from catwalk to brave the elements and look fabulous. This pair goes with denims, skirts and even leggings. UpperSynthetic leather upper with a strap for the forefoot and heel collar for ankle supportTwo inter-looping elasticated, multicoloured straps from the collar to hold the foot in placeErgonomically designed footbed with mild padding for instep comfortOutsole reinforced onto the upper in the heel region for comfortOutsoleTPU outsole with floral groovesshoe CareWipe surface with soft, clean cloth to remove dustDo not machine wash or use a drierDo not store in direct sunlight
